mnemonics: LINEAR: Linearly Inputted Numbers Explain Approximate Relationships
keyPoints: Regression analysis predicts a continuous output value based on input variables.
The goal is to find the line (or hyperplane) of best fit that minimizes the error between predicted and actual values.
Key metrics for evaluation include R-squared, Mean Squared Error (MSE), and Mean Absolute Error (MAE).
commonMistakes: Confusing regression (predicting continuous values) with classification (predicting discrete categories).
Assuming a high R-squared value always means a good model, without checking for overfitting or residual patterns.
